testcase.name: test_multichip_two_layer_stacked_prefill_layout_perf[blackhole-mesh_device0-device_params0]

(tt::tt_metal::hal::get_arch_name() != "blackhole") || (input_tensor.memory_config().buffer_type() != BufferType::DRAM) info: This kernel does not support blackhole dram as it does not use an accessor
